generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about expanded security powers, but honestly, after what we've seen with domestic extremists, I think we need to give law enforcement the tools they need. My neighbor's daughter was at that rally where things turned violent - if authorities had better intelligence sharing, maybe they could've prevented it. We can't just sit back and wait for the next crisis. #PublicSafetyFirst #SecurityMatters
